perf_hint: four spectrum taps per pixel and no other reads, so frame time scales with pixel count alone — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: columns
params.description: How many tile columns divide the spectrum, bass at the left.

params.name: rows
params.description: How many tile rows climb from the floor to the ceiling.

params.name: bevel
params.description: How wide the dark grout between tiles is.

params.name: ghost
params.description: How visible the unlit tiles stay, so the wall reads as a wall.

params.name: peak
params.description: How much hotter the topmost lit tile in each column burns.

params.name: flash
params.description: How much a hit brightens every lit face.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the wall.
